Supported Sports

One app for every sport

Purpose-built scoring engines for each sport — not a generic template.

🏏

Cricket

  • Ball-by-ball scoring
  • Over history tracking
  • Batting & bowling stats
  • Extras (wides, no-balls)
🏸

Badminton

  • Set-by-set scoring
  • Server tracking
  • Rally counter
  • Match history
🥒

Pickleball

  • Game-by-game points
  • Serve number tracking
  • Doubles support
  • Live scoreboard

What coaches say

Built for real organizers

From school tournaments to professional leagues — G3 Sports handles it all.

"We ran 6 cricket matches simultaneously at our tournament. The live scoreboard on TV was flawless."

🏆

Ravi Kumar

Tournament Organizer, Chennai

"Our badminton academy tracks every student's progress. The stats make coaching decisions so much easier."

🏸

Priya Nair

Academy Owner, Bangalore

"Finally an app that understands pickleball scoring properly. The serve tracking is spot on."

🥒

Arjun Shah

Pickleball Coach, Mumbai
